{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blood Sage’s Remnant
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage’s Remnant]] is a powerful blood-spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blood Sage’s Remnant]] is working to integrate the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] [[madra]] into a hunger technique for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blood Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] is a crimson skeleton with floating eyes and no visible eyes in its skull.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blood Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] resembles a spirit born from nightmares.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
